date_notes: Anchored to the September 2023 provincial pension report; the initiative spans 2023 to 2025.
title_en: Alberta Pension Plan pursuit and shelving
description_en: The Government of Alberta pursued withdrawal from the Canada Pension Plan in favour of a provincial plan. A provincial report claimed an entitlement of approximately 334 billion dollars to CPP assets. The CPP chief actuary did not provide an Alberta-specific figure. Public response was substantially opposed, and the initiative was shelved in 2025.
verification_notes: The ~$334B figure is the provincial claim; R-D0000009 (actuary did not estimate an Alberta share) is the counterweight and must be carried with it. Confirm the opposition-polling figure (~60-63%) against a primary before stating it.

update_log.change: Created from harvest batch; suppressed pending verification.
